evals.prompt: Guion aprobado: una chef futurista prepara recuerdos como platos luminosos en una cocina de vidrio. Necesito casting, locacion, vestuario y props por separado.
evals.expected_output: Should create an Asset Bible with stable IDs for characters, wardrobe, location, props and mood, prepare all prompts/paths before generation, generate independent assets in parallel or batch when supported, use character sheet prompts with left-aligned portrait plus front/right/left/back views on white, use location prompts as 16:9 2x2 grids, and organize files under outputs/<run-id>/02_assets/ if in a packaged project.

evals.prompt: A partir de este beat sheet aprobado, generame character sheets y locaciones, pero no hagas storyboard todavia.
evals.expected_output: Should stay in asset stage, avoid shot lists/storyboard, use the standard character sheet format for characters and 2x2 grids for locations, and end with an approval question for assets.

evals.prompt: One-shot assets para un spot Seedance: atleta urbana, zapatillas inteligentes, tunel de metro, lluvia neon, sin generar video.
evals.expected_output: Should produce separate reusable asset prompts/IDs, mark assumptions, and provide next handoff to storyboard without Seedance prompt YAML.

evals.prompt: Te paso character sheets completos del robot y el cavernicola. No los regeneres; solo usalos para el storyboard y genera la locacion que falta.
evals.expected_output: Should copy/register provided character sheets as source/approved assets, avoid regenerating them, generate only missing location assets, and use provided sheets as primary references.
